visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie stands in a dimly lit room, turned slightly to his right, looking off-screen. Another person, partially visible and out of focus, sits in front of a glowing computer monitor displaying a blue-toned image. The man’s face is partially illuminated, showing his focused gaze downward toward the monitor.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable prosody or background sounds.
